summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Segundo Cérebro da Estrategista' MVP. All core features working: authentication, goals dashboard, content library with AI generation, and strategic AI chat. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI fully operational with proper design implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge occasionally overlays send button
ui_bugs.workaround: Enter key works to send messages

passed_tests: User registration and login with test credentials
Goals creation, editing, and progress tracking
Content Library theme generation with AI
Content Library script generation with AI
AI chat with strategic business mentoring
Lion profile image and ESTRATEGISTA branding
Dark theme colors and design specifications
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvement: Adjust z-index or positioning of 'Made with Emergent' badge to prevent overlay on chat send button. Otherwise, application is fully functional and ready for production.
